description_long: This is a modern double-sided office desk with a rectangular tabletop and a central divider panel, designed to accommodate two users facing opposite directions. The desk features two sets of under-desk storage cabinets, each with a door, providing secure storage space on both sides. The tabletop has two cable management grommets, one for each user, allowing for organized routing of electrical cords. The supporting structure consists of black metal frames with geometric lines, giving the desk a sturdy yet contemporary appearance. The surfaces are finished in a light gray color, with the divider panel matching the tabletop. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for collaborative or shared workspaces.
description: A modern double-sided office desk with a central divider, under-desk storage cabinets, and black metal frame supports. The light gray surfaces and cable management grommets make it ideal for shared workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, both storage cabinets, and the central divider panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the tabletop, and the geometric metal frame supports.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both storage cabinets and the divider panel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the desk's depth and the open structure of the metal frame.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the storage cabinet directly accessible and the divider panel in front, with the tabletop and cable grommet positioned for ergonomic use.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for two users in a shared office environment
